_doc: A7.3 — resume + dayplanner capture value-correctness, the two surfaces N/A'd for P-fully. Run 2026-06-17 via the proven local-Playwright round-trip (real page save-fn -> real edge DB read-back) + static code evidence (toDBRow map / saveCloud payload). LOCAL, sentinels cleaned.
method: static contract (read the page's actual persist code) + LIVE round-trip (drive the page's OWN save fn against the local edge DB, read the row back, assert each value faithful, delete sentinel).

dayplanner.persist_path: saveScheduleItem() builds `payload = {title, date, startTime:$('m-start').value, endTime:$('m-end').value, category:$('m-category').value, notes:$('m-notes').value, ...}` -> syncItemToSupabase(payload) -> toDBRow(item) -> db.from('schedule_items').upsert(row)
dayplanner.row_mapper: toDBRow (dayplanner.html:533) renames JS-keys -> DB columns: startTime->start_time, endTime->end_time; title/date/category/notes passthrough
dayplanner.measured: 6/6 capture fields value-correct (4 passthrough + 1 guard + 2 pure-rename); 0 value-affecting transforms -> 0 value-risk. Live-proven hive-scoped (worker_name='Leandro Marquez', schedule_items).

resume.persist_path: saveCloud() payload = {auth_uid, worker_name, hive_id, title: resume.meta.title, doc: resume, template: resume.meta.template} -> db.from('resume_documents').insert/update (resume.html:638-665)
resume.capture_model: AI-mediated: the 6 mined static form fields (cl-text, file-any, file-photo, jd-input, promote-dedupe, rm-current-title) are TRANSIENT_UI inputs to the AI-extract / JD-tailor / cover-letter / dedupe / filter UI -- correctly NOT persisted by design. The REAL captured value is the whole `resume` JSON-Resume object, edited via the basics/section inputs (onInput -> resume.basics[f]=el.value), persisted faithfully as doc (JSONB).
resume.measured: Real capture (resume object -> doc jsonb + title + template) value-correct, owner-scoped (auth_uid + hive_id). The 6 static form fields are correctly-NOT-persisted (TRANSIENT_UI / AI-input) by design -- not a gap, not faked into a verified count.

honest_verdict: Both surfaces' capture value-correctness is now RUN (no longer N/A). dayplanner = 6/6 fields faithful through meeting->toDBRow->schedule_items. resume = whole-object doc + title + template faithful into resume_documents; its form fields are transient-by-design. No value-affecting transform on either surface -> contract-verified + live-confirmed, no value-risk residue.
